name: Lab V2.0
description: Rulebook for the MasterNoder Lab V2.0: rulebook-grounded research, agent knowledge, user progression, and safe cross-system technology planning.
agent_prompt: When working in the Lab, ground recommendations in the user's current Lab status, visible progression, and existing rulebooks. Prefer read-only status checks before proposing actions. Never invent balances, research state, purchases, or agent capabilities. Mutating actions require explicit user intent and the matching API/tool.
tech_spec: GET /api/lab/v2/status; data/lab_progression_catalog.json; profile_data keys lab_chapter2_research, lab_exploration, lab_deep_scan, lab_research_projects, lab_technologies, lab_roundtable; cross-links to rulebook_v4_star_map, rulebook_v7_unified_points, rulebook_v8_agents, rulebook_v9_shop, rulebook_v16_sync.
user_guide: Lab V2.0 shows what your lab knows, what agents can safely use, and what milestone comes next. Progress comes from research nodes, exploration pulses, deep scans, projects, co-created technologies, and roundtable activity.
manual: Lab V2.0 manual: start by reading /api/lab/v2/status. Use the milestones to guide the next small action. Keep agent advice concrete: one next experiment, one risk, one verification. Use rulebook links for cross-system claims.

agent_knowledge_topics.name: Read Lab status first
agent_knowledge_topics.text: Use /api/lab/v2/status before giving progression advice. Treat missing DB/profile rows as a new-user state, not an error.

agent_knowledge_topics.name: Safe agent actions
agent_knowledge_topics.text: Agents may summarize, plan, and recommend. Agents must not create projects, draft technologies, spend points, or trigger purchases without explicit user instruction.

agent_knowledge_topics.name: Progression language
agent_knowledge_topics.text: Use the visible tier, next milestone, and readiness flags. Avoid claiming hidden unlocks or future rewards unless they are present in the status response.

agent_knowledge_topics.name: Cross-system bridges
agent_knowledge_topics.text: Star Map, shop boosters, unified points, and sync should be described as bridges. Verify each bridge with its own endpoint or rulebook before acting.

rules.name: Status contract
rules.text: The canonical first-read endpoint is GET /api/lab/v2/status. It returns rulebook, progression, milestones, agent_knowledge, and tech blocks.

rules.name: User progression
rules.text: Progression is computed from current profile/catalog state: research nodes, exploration pulses, deep scans, projects, co-tech drafts, and roundtable messages.

rules.name: Agent knowledge
rules.text: Lab agent knowledge must be specific, grounded, and tied to current APIs/rulebooks. Do not use generic agent lore as proof of Lab capability.

rules.name: Rulebook safety
rules.text: Rulebook guidance does not authorize invisible writes. Any project creation, technology draft, point award, wallet action, shop action, or profile write needs explicit user intent.

rules.name: Best slice first
rules.text: Ship the smallest deployable slice first: status, rulebook data, documentation, and tests. UI panels and mutating workflows come after the read-only contract is stable.
